apartments.description: 3 rooms ~65 sqm, floor 1 no elevator. Private parking (fits 2 cars). Sun balcony. Renovated, spacious, bright and quiet. 1 bathroom, 1 toilet. Solar water heater. Includes: fridge, oven, stove, dishwasher. Vaad ~170/month, Arnona ~750/2 months. Entry 1/4/2026. Suitable for couple+, long term.

apartments.address: Near Basel Complex, Old North, Tel Aviv

apartments.description: 3 rooms 70 sqm, floor 3 with elevator. High-level renovation - all new plumbing and windows. Bathroom + shower with washer/dryer space. Guest toilet. Bedroom closets. High ceilings. Electric oven and stove. Vaad 270/month, Arnona ~320/month.

viewing.notes: Agency. WhatsApp and specify which apartment.

apartments.description: 3 rooms 75 sqm, floor 1 no elevator. Bargain price! Quiet street near Nordau, Dizengoff and beach. Very spacious and bright. 2 spacious bedrooms + huge living room. New spacious kitchen with dining area. Washer and gas connection. Renovated bathroom and toilet. No shelter in building but public shelter nearby. Immediate entry!

apartments.address: Yehoshua Bin Nun St, Tel Aviv
apartments.description: 3 rooms ~70 sqm, floor 3 with elevator. Rare apartment on Yehoshua Bin Nun - one of the best and quietest areas. Full renovation - everything new including windows. Closets in apartment. Bright, pleasant and airy. Shelter in building. Immediate entry. Suitable for long term. Arnona ~640/2 months, Vaad 270/month.

3 rooms ~70 sqm + 14 sqm balcony. Boutique building (4 years old), floor 5/7. Rear facing - south & west. Large living room with west-facing balcony. 2 spacious bedrooms (one master/ensuite). Bathroom + shower + designed guest toilet. High ceilings ~2.9m. Underground parking + storage. Parquet, double-glazed windows, electric shutters, recessed lighting, wall closets. Immediate entry, long term.
